description: Nx is a monorepo build and CI platform for managing large codebases, task execution, caching, and workspace-aware developer workflows. It also offers Nx Cloud features for remote caching, distributed CI, and AI-assisted development.
summary: nx.dev documents an installable Nx CLI and an Nx MCP server; the CLI integrates with Nx Cloud using personal access tokens or CI access tokens, and no public nx.dev-hosted HTTP or GraphQL API surface was documented.
